content: Omarchy: 19 built-in themes selectable via Walker menu (Super+Alt+Space) or direct theme-picker keybind. Each theme = one colors.toml that generates configs for terminal, btop, Chromium, Hyprland, Hyprlock, Mako, SwayOSD, Walker, Waybar via a single templating pipeline. Theme switch restarts/reloads each app live, no relogin. Per-theme wallpaper sets supported.
